name: Sania Gurung
my_twin: I'd track the gap between when I sit down to work and when I actually start — because some days I open my laptop and I'm writing code within minutes, and other days I spend an hour rearranging tabs and convincing myself to begin. I suspect it has something to do with how the previous day ended, whether I finished something or left it half-done, but I've never had the data to confirm it. I want to know if that pattern is real, and if it is, I want to catch it before I waste another morning.
